data.title: Bitcoin Pushes Toward $100,000 as Equities Lag and Safe Havens Surge — Here Is Why Markets Are Shifting
data.description:
Bitcoin is steadily making its way toward the significant milestone of $100,000, showcasing a remarkable upward trend, even as traditional equity markets struggle to keep pace and experience stagnation. Meanwhile, investments considered safe havens, such as gold and government bonds, are witnessing a surge in demand and value. This shift in market dynamics raises questions about the underlying factors driving these changes, prompting analysts and investors to explore the reasons behind the growing appeal of cryptocurrency amidst the lackluster performance of stocks and increased interest in safer investment options.
source: https://blocknews.com/bitcoin-pushes-toward-100000-as-equities-lag-and-safe-havens-surge-here-is-why-markets-are-shifting/

data.title: Bitcoin hits 2026 high above $97K, data shows sufficient fuel for higher prices

data.title: QCP Says Bitcoin’s Finally Waking Up After Lagging Stocks and Gold
data.description:
Bitcoin pushes through $95,000 resistance to reach $97,000 as the digital asset finally aligns with broader risk-on sentiment, though analysts note political uncertainty and dollar weakness create mixed signals for sustained momentum.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/qcp-says-bitcoins-finally-waking-up-after-lagging-stocks-and-gold/

Standard Chartered has released a fresh bullish outlook on Ethereum (ETH), projecting that the cryptocurrency will climb sharply this decade.

data.title: Fed Official Highlights Tension Between Duties and Inflation Target
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari has highlighted a tension between the responsibilities of the Federal Reserve and its inflation target.

data.title: Significant Transfer of TON Tokens Between Anonymous Addresses
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Arkham data reveals that at 01:20, 14,991,100 TON tokens were transferred from one anonymous address to another. Following this transaction, a portion of the TON tokens was moved to Kiln.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Balance Sheet Expansion Not Quantitative Easing, Says Kashkari
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari has stated that the current expansion of the Federal Reserve's balance sheet does not constitute a quantitative easing policy.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Kashkari Optimistic About Economic Growth
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Kashkari expressed optimism regarding the economic outlook, anticipating robust growth. He does not see the need for the Federal Reserve to implement quantitative easing measures.

data.title: Federal Reserve Maintains 2% Inflation Target
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari stated that the 2% inflation rate remains the Federal Reserve's target, and the institution is committed to achieving this level.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Bostic Warns of Potential Price Pressure
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Bostic has indicated that there may be increased upward pressure on prices, which requires careful monitoring.

data.title: Federal Reserve Official Questions Tightening of Monetary Policy
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari has expressed some doubts regarding the actual extent of monetary policy tightening.

data.title: Federal Reserve Official Comments on Economic Slowdown
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari stated that the current economic slowdown is not as severe as the market had anticipated.

data.title: Federal Reserve Official Kashkari Comments on Economic Conditions
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari has expressed concerns over the current economic situation, describing it as perplexing. He noted that the job market is showing signs of weakness.

data.title: BoE policymaker sees trade diversion easing UK inflation
data.description:
Trade diversion caused by U. S. tariffs on China is helping lower UK inflation by increasing cheaper imports.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/boe-sees-trade-diversion-easing-uk-inflation/
